titleStmt.title: SII 24.556: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 556. (A.R. No. 9 of 1936-37.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase by Vādhūkula (Vādhūla) Dēśikar for offerings to the god on specified days namely, nine days during which the Tiruvāymoḻi is sung and 6 days of the Tirupavitra festivities including the day on which he is taken out in procession to Kōṭṭai Chennama-Nāyakkar-maṇḍapam. The details of date viz. Śaka 1602, Raudri, Kuṁbha, śu. 7, Sunday, Svāti, correspond to A.D. 1681, January 30, Sunday, if the tithi quoted, viz., śu. 7, is considered a mistake for ba. 7.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 6 100 2 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa ravutiriṉāma samvatsarattu kumpaṉāyattup pūṟuvapakṣattu sattamiyum
bhānuvāsaramum petta(ta) svāti nakṣattirattu ṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakula Acanivaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷaṉāṭṭut tiru
varaṅkat tiruppati śrīraṅganārāyaṇajiyar mutalāṉa Aṉaittuk kottu sthānikarum kulacekaraṉ tiruvitiyilk koṭṭaic ceṉ
ṉamaṉāyakkar maṇṭapattil namperumāḷ Amutuceytaruḷum vakai ṉāḷ 1- kku t teṅkāy paḻam vaṭaipparuppu Arivāṇa
m 2 pāṉakam kūṉ 2 Iḷanīr 5 10 1 pāvāṭai parivaṭṭam tirumuṉ kāṇikkai Uḷpaṭat tiruvāymoḻit tiruṉāḷ 9 tiruppavuttaratti
5ṉāḷ ṉāḷ 6 Āka ṉāḷ 10 5 kkum mārkaḻi periya tirumaṇṭapam periya tiruvaṭi nayiṉār tirunakṣatrattu Amutu ceytaruḷum Ami
ṟta kalacam 2 100 poṅkal ttaḷikai 2 pākku vettilai Arivāṇam 1 cantaṇappaṭi 10 Inta vakaippaṭikkuk koyil śrīpaṇṭārattile
viṭṭu naṭakkum paṭikkum poliyūṭṭukku senāpatip peruvilaiyāka nilam Upakṣaya- ttārar pūṟuva śilācāsanam paṇṇik kuṭutta
paṭi Ittiruppati ceṉai mutaliyār toppu toṟaṇattaccimāvaṭi puñcaiyil mutalāḻ vār koyilk kovuḷaṭi nilam
kaṇṭikaikku meṟku toṟaṇattāccimāvaṭikku kiḻakku vaṭakkukkaraikkut teṟku toppu vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷp

paṭṭa puñcaiyil rācavipāṭaṉāl nilam (1/4) Innilaṅ kālum senāpatip peruvilaiyāka vādhūkulatecikar camaṟpitta pon_ 2 10
Intap poṉṉirupatum koyil śrīpaṇṭārattile mutaliṭṭa paṭiyiṉāle Innilam kālum tāme nañcaiyāka tirutti vicca nilam
koyil śrīpaṇṭārattile cettapaṭiyiṉāle Inta Upaiyam ĀcantrāṟkasthāniRead ºsthāyiº yāka naṭattakkaṭavatākavum Inta vakaikku Uṇṭāṉa
viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu khādhūkulatecikar peṟak kaṭavatākavum r
Digital edition of SII 24.556 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
